Roadmap

Storyline

Created by Matt Furie in 2018.

Tokenised in 2024 on Solana.

How it all started

How it all started

In the year 2018, Matt Furie, the creator of the infamous Pepe the Frog meme, made a bold ​decision. He decided to bring a new character to life - Doogle, his first ever dog ​character. Doogle was a lovable, goofy dog with a big heart and a penchant for getting ​into silly situations.


At first, Doogle didn't quite catch on in the meme world. People were used to the familiar ​faces of Pepe and other popular memes, and Doogle seemed to get lost in the sea of ​internet content. But Matt Furie was determined to give Doogle a chance to shine.


It wasn't until 2024 when the Solana blockchain platform started gaining popularity ​that Doogle finally had his moment. Someone discovered Doogle and decided to tokenize ​him, turning him into a unique and scarce digital asset. The news spread like wildfire, and ​suddenly, Doogle memes were everywhere.


People couldn't get enough of Doogle's funny faces and quirky antics. He quickly became ​a symbol of positivity and joy in a world that desperately needed it. Solana users traded ​Doogle tokens like crazy, and the value of owning a rare Doogle meme skyrocketed.


Matt Furie was overjoyed to see his creation finally getting the recognition it deserved. ​He watched in amazement as Doogle took the internet by storm, bringing smiles to ​millions of faces around the world.


And so, Doogle became a household name, a beloved meme that would go down in history as ​one of the most endearing and iconic characters of the digital age. Thanks to the ​creativity and determination of Matt Furie, Doogle became a symbol of pure, ​unadulterated fun in a world that needed a little bit of laughter.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Get involved

We have an active community on Telegram and Twitter, come and say hello!


Whats the point of Doogle?

Doogle is a cartoon character made by Matt Furie.

The purpose of the character is to entertain and make people smile.

Why cant I buy Doogle on Coinbase, kraken, binance. Etc?

Currently, Doogle is only available for trading on-chain. Look out for future announcements to see if we get a listing on your favourite exchange!

What chain is Doogle on?

Doogle is available to trade on the Solana blockchain. Please see the 'How to buy Doogle section to learn more.
